mapper.select:
SELECT cm.id, cm.msg_id, cm.chat_type, cm.content, cm.dialog_id, cm.status, cm.`timestamp`, cm.created_at FROM chat_message cm INNER JOIN ( SELECT dialog_id, MAX(created_at) AS max_time FROM chat_message WHERE is_delete = 0 AND (status = 0 OR status = 1) GROUP BY dialog_id ) t ON cm.dialog_id = t.dialog_id AND cm.created_at = t.max_time WHERE cm.dialog_id in
#{item}
SELECT id, msg_id, chat_type, content, dialog_id, status, `timestamp`, created_at FROM chat_message WHERE to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND status = 0 AND is_delete = 0 ORDER BY created_at Desc
